market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this modern 4-person entire home offering 48.9% availability in the next 90 days at £324/night. Despite being 110% pricier than average listings (£154.60), this property maintains a strong 4.9 rating from 308 reviews. While currently underperforming vs pricing benchmarks, strategic updates could enhance appeal. First-timer Craig hosts with no reviews, making transparency and clear value propositions critical. Guests enjoy secure parking (if available), private outdoor space (subject to confirmation), and entertainment amenities (awaiting verification). With 46 open nights remaining until occupancy peaks at 51% (vs cohort median 47.8%), this property has unmet demand potential at current price points. Full disclosure: Amenities and photo inventory require updating to match premium positioning.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize cover photo featuring building exterior showing accessibility or a room showing floor-to-ceiling windows to visually justify premium pricing
key_diagnosis: Priced 110% above market median (£324 vs £154.60) but occupancy remains only 1.1% higher than cohort average
Missing 3 high-value amenity categories linked to booking conversions
Title fails to communicate premium positioning or differentiate from standard listings
Description field is entirely missing (scored as 1/10) creating trust vacuum
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £324 rate is double the market median yet occupancy trails competitors by 1.1% — let's optimize this pricing strategy
